title: Floral Creamy Romantic Jamaican Ground Pistachio Knead
description: A rich, creamy, and fragrant Jamaican dish featuring ground pistachios and a soft knead, suitable for Ayurvedic and Tamasic diets.

ingredients.name: coconut milk
ingredients.notes: full-fat, full-fat or low-fat for a lighter version

ingredients.name: jasmine tea
ingredients.notes: brewed, cooled, and sweetened with a hint of honey

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine ground pistachios, coconut milk, and coconut oil. Mix until a smooth dough forms.
Add vanilla extract, lime juice, and garam masala. Mix well to combine.
Transfer the dough to a kneading surface and knead for 10-15 minutes until smooth and pliable.
Divide the dough into 8 equal portions and shape into small balls.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat and add 1 tablespoon of coconut oil. When hot, add the dough balls and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side until golden brown.
Transfer the cooked dough balls to a serving plate and drizzle with maple syrup.
Garnish with chopped rose petals and serve warm.
Chill the remaining dough in the refrigerator for up to 3 days or freeze for up to 2 months for future use.
To serve, thaw the dough and reheat it in a skillet over low heat for 2-3 minutes until warm and soft.
